Swiggy & Zomato make Rs 90-105 on every Rs 300 order you place. 
Rapido just launched Ownly - a food delivery app with ZERO commission from restaurants.
But here’s the real question no one’s asking:
Can they actually survive this model?
The math says no - at least not yet.
Right now, they LOSE Rs 49 on every single order.
More orders = more losses. That’s the trap.
The only way out? Introduce commission by mid-2027.
If they do - they need 14 lakh orders/day to break even by FY2028.
If they don’t - no volume in the world saves them.
This is the most interesting business bet in India right now.
A company betting that market share today = pricing power tomorrow.
Will it work? Drop your take below

SLMs (Small Language Models) are ChatGPT’s smarter, cheaper, more private cousin trained on your exact industry, running on your own server, zero cloud costs, zero data leaks.StockGro cut their AI bill by 95% with one.
Dhan built an entire financial SLM hosted inside India.
Law firms are running AI on their own servers so not a single client file ever leaves the building.The future of AI isn’t bigger. It’s smarter.Share this with a founder who’s still paying GPT-4 bills.
